name: Ashen Banner
description: Oath-bound marcher lords ruling from war camps, toll roads, and weathered keeps.

name: Dust Veil Clans
description: Horse clans and caravan princes who follow salt winds, old stars, and buried water.

name: Horned Moot
description: Totem herds and blood-oath tribes gathering around standing stones and bone fires.

name: Underking Warrens
description: Burrow courts, scavenger guilds, and plague-lit markets gnawing beneath ruined roads.

name: Pale Bough Covenant
description: Fading woodland houses bound to moonlit groves, old griefs, and thorn-crowned law.

name: Deep Anvil Holds
description: Stone-bound clans holding mine shrines, oath vaults, and smoke-black forge halls.
